# Stage 0 — Inspect and load

Load scDiffCom results, apply DE malignant + unknown-celltype filters (via shared
[`load.and.filter.malignant.by.cohorts()`](../../R/01_load_filter.R)), write gene universe reports.

```{r stage-00-setup, include=FALSE}
if (!exists("cfg")) {
  source(file.path("..", "R", "00_atlas_setup.R"))
  init.atlas.session(normalizePath("..", winslash = "/"))
}
```

```{r stage-00}
stage00_path <- file.path(results_dir, "stage00_atlas_env.rds")
if (file.exists(stage00_path)) {
  message("Loading existing stage00_atlas_env.rds (delete to re-run from scratch)")
  atlas_env <- readRDS(stage00_path)
} else {
  atlas_env <- run_stage_00_inspect(cfg)
  file.copy(
    file.path(ATLAS_DIR, "config.yml"),
    file.path(results_dir, "config_used.yml"),
    overwrite = TRUE
  )
}
assign("atlas_env", atlas_env, envir = .GlobalEnv)
length(atlas_env$gene_universe)
```
